query:
SELECT
            m.id as message_id,
            c.email_address as "sender!",
            COALESCE(c.name, c.email_address) as "pretty_sender!"
        FROM email_messages m
        LEFT JOIN email_contacts c ON c.id = m.from_contact_id
        WHERE m.id = ANY($1)
        AND m.link_id = ANY($2)
